content.en:
The other side.

Ye Tian is also constantly researching new three-source secret medicine, the materials used are incomparably precious, and after trying again and again, he has finally researched a new three-source secret medicine, which is of great help to the breakthrough.

After a lot of preparations, he was ready to hit the sixth balance realm again.

After deduction, he estimated that his success rate of breaking through the sixth balance was between 20% and 30%.

This success rate is not high, but it is not low either.

Soon.

He began to break through and took out a Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill.

"Eat them all!"

Ye Tian swallowed the Reincarnation Realm Breaking Pill, the new Three-Origin Secret Medicine, and several resource treasures that could help break through, and only then did he begin to impact the Sixth Balance Realm.

Click!!!

The bottleneck seemed to crack a little, but he still failed to break through.

After the breakthrough failed, his body continued to crack, and even his origin was affected.

"It takes a long time for this replica body to recover, just change to a replica body!"

Ye Tian directly annihilated this replica body that failed to break through, and then summed up his experience to find out the reason for the failure of the breakthrough, and after a period of time, he began to impact the sixth balance realm.

That's it.

Ye Tian began to try again and again, constantly looking for the experience of failure.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian completed the breakthrough.

Rumble!!!!!!

Ye Tian's bottleneck was torn apart, and he officially broke through to the sixth balance realm.

His Reincarnation Haotian Body, Reincarnation Haotian Origin, and Origin Realm Will were all rapidly transforming and improving, and the three powers were more fused together.

This metamorphosis lasted for millions of primeval epochs, and this is the end.

"Breakthrough!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

He is much stronger now than he was in the past, and the sixth balance is much stronger than the fifth.

But.

"I shouldn't be the opponent of the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord!"

Ye Tian said with a sigh.

The span from the fifth to the sixth balance is not as great as the eight to nine awakenings.

Of course, he estimated that he had about one-half of the strength of the Nine-Awakened Origin Upper Realm Overlord, and there was hope that he would escape from the Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

But if you encounter the top Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords, there is still no hope of escaping.

"I still have to improve my strength, if I create a few more reincarnation supreme divine powers, and then raise my cultivation to the limit of the sixth balance, maybe I won't be afraid of the ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord!" Ye Tian muttered.

However, if Ye Tian dispatched several replica bodies to besiege an ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord together, then he would definitely not be left behind.

In other words, Ye Tian was now completely unafraid of the ordinary Nine Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords.

After the breakthrough in cultivation, Ye Tian found that it was a little easier for him to create the supreme divine power of reincarnation, which was that the realm was improved, and his comprehension ability would naturally increase.

At this time, he finally created the third reincarnation supreme supernatural power.

This reincarnation supreme divine power is a defensive reincarnation supreme divine power, once urged, the body will become extremely tough, and the defense will be increased many times.

Ye Tian named this reincarnation supreme divine power the reincarnation vajra body!

"This time I created the reincarnation vajra body, my life-saving ability has increased greatly, and my combat effectiveness has also been greatly improved, and there are no too weak defects!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course.

It's still not enough to just have three reincarnation supreme powers, he has to continue to create more reincarnation supreme powers.

Of course, there is still a need to improve the cultivation.

If his cultivation was raised to the seventh balance, he would definitely be able to reach the level of the Ninth Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord, such as the combat power comparable to the original Origin Ancestor.

"Origin Ancestor, it's time to go there!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He was about to enter the treasure world in the body of the Origin Ancestor, and if he entered there during this period, even the overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who had awakened eight times would have to fall.

However, Ye Tian felt that he still had hope of surviving.

Wow!

He tore through the barrier and entered the ruins of reincarnation to the sea of hurricanes.

Soon, the sea of hurricanes arrived.

The last time I came, the hurricane sea subsided and there wasn't a single hurricane.

But at the moment, the roar of the hurricane here affects infinite time and space.

"The hurricane of the Hurricane Sea is a hurricane blowing from the mouth of the Origin Ancestor, containing strange power, even the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlords can be killed, but it shouldn't be able to kill me now!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Without hesitation, he went straight into the sea of hurricanes.

Bang!!!!

The hurricane of the hurricane sea kept blowing Ye Tian's body, and it was very painful, but he resisted.

"Sure enough, with my current strength, which far surpasses the Overlord of the Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realms, the Hurricane Sea really can't kill me!"

Ye Tian slowly moved forward and headed towards the entrance of the Origin Ancestor Treasure World.

Unlike the last time I came, the last time this entrance was very calm, but at this moment it was extremely dangerous, and hurricanes were blowing, enough to kill any Eight Awakening Origin Upper Realm Overlord.

"Reincarnation Vajra Body!"

Ye Tian urged this reincarnation supreme divine power, and only then did he break into this entrance.

He knew very well that the treasure world in the Origin Ancestor's body was extremely risky now, the last time he was stranded here, the copy body he was stranded here was pinched to death by a rule power in the underworld, and now he will inevitably encounter this rule power.

"I wonder if this rule power is the same as the rule power in that fragment of the reincarnation domain?"

Ye Tian was very curious about this.

Wow!

Ye Tian, under the protection of the reincarnation vajra body, passed through this entrance, and nothing happened.

And just after entering, the power of the rules in the darkness seemed to turn into a hand and pinched him.

Click!!!

Ye Tian's body seemed to be sizzling, and even the reincarnation vajra body was a little unbearable.

"I was killed in seconds before, but now I don't know how many times stronger I don't know, and I finally didn't get killed in seconds!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, if he maintains it like this, he won't last long.

"Go to the rift, maybe you can find a clue!"

He'd been to the rift before, but he hadn't really entered the rift, he had just entered the rift area, and he didn't know what was on the other side of the rift.

However, he had a feeling that the power of this rule should have spread from the other end of the rift.

It's just that when the hurricane of the Hurricane Sea disappears, it means that the power in the Origin Ancestor's body has awakened and suppressed the rift, which makes the power of that rule temporarily disappear, and the Origin Upper Realm Overlords dare to enter here.

Soon.

Ye Tian found a rift.
